top_signals.title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks That Threatened Peace Talks
top_signals.summary: Iran and Israel agreed to ease strikes against each other after a flare-up in violence threatened to derail peace negotiations and led President Donald Trump to appeal for de-escalation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Commission approves €23 billion Italian State aid scheme to support renewable electricity production*
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 08 Jun 2026 The European Commission has approved a €23 billion Italian State aid scheme to support electricity production from renewable energy sources, in line with the objectives of the Clean Industrial Deal. This measure will contribute to the transition towards a net-zero economy and reaching the renewable energy target set at EU level for 2030. The scheme was approved under the Clean Industrial Deal State Aid Framework (CISAF) adopted by the Commission on 25 June 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman-backed Go prices Japan’s biggest 2026 IPO at upper end
top_signals.summary: Shareholders in the Goldman Sachs Group-backed firm sold shares at ¥2,400 apiece, according to a regulatory filing on Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Retirement 'underspending' is risky, advisor says. Here's why
top_signals.summary: Retirees often focus on the risk of spending too much in retirement. But spending too little poses another kind of danger.

top_signals.title: Foreign investors have dumped billions of dollars of Korean stocks this year despite record rally. Here's why
top_signals.summary: The selling intensified Monday as the benchmark Kospi plunged more than 8% at the open, even as it emerged as one of the world's standout performers thus far.

top_signals.title: Sam Bankman-Fried officially asks Trump for a presidential pardon
Strategy shareholders approve semi-monthly dividends for STRC preferred stock
top_signals.summary: "Paying dividends on STRC twice a month is designed to stabilize price, dampen cyclicality, drive liquidity, and grow demand for STRC," Strategy's CEO said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Exclusive | Morgan Stanley Sees SpaceX’s Revenue Reaching $3.4 Trillion in 2040  WSJ
